name: pagou/examples-php
description: Runnable PHP reference examples for the Pagou API v2 core flows.

scripts-descriptions.pay:pix: Create a Pix charge and print the copy-and-paste QR payload.
scripts-descriptions.pay:voucher: Create a voucher/boleto charge with async instructions.
scripts-descriptions.pay:retrieve: Retrieve a transaction by its public UUID.
scripts-descriptions.pay:reconcile: Reconcile a transaction and print the fulfillment decision.
scripts-descriptions.pay:card: Charge a pgct_ card token produced by the Payment Element.
scripts-descriptions.pay:card:server: Serve the browser Payment Element card demo.
scripts-descriptions.checkout:create: Create a hosted checkout link and store its public URL.
scripts-descriptions.subs:demo: Create/reuse a customer and run the subscription lifecycle.
scripts-descriptions.transfers:demo: Create, reconcile and cancel a Pix Out transfer.
scripts-descriptions.webhooks:server: Run the webhook receiver for the three envelope families.
